Our Story

Born From
Bold Flavour

Galaxy 9ine started with one obsession — food that hits differently. Our broasted chicken is pressure-cooked in a secret blend of 9 spices, golden and crispy outside, impossibly juicy inside.

From smash burgers stacked with American cheese, to stone-baked pizzas and thick galaxy shakes — every item is made to be your next favourite meal.

🔥
Fresh Every Time
Everything made to order. No heat lamps, no shortcuts.
🌶️
Secret Spice Blend
Our G9 signature marinade. 9 spices, perfected over time.
🏆
Quality Promise
Quality time comes with quality food — our one rule.
⚡
Fast & Bold
Fast service, bold flavours. Never one without the other.
View Full Menu
What We Do

Everything
Done Right

Signature
01 ——
🍗
Broasted Chicken

Pressure-fried broasted chicken cooked in our signature spices for a crispy outside and juicy inside. Choose from Wings, Strips, Popcorn Chicken, Roasted Leg and classic Broast pieces — available in multiple sizes and combos.

Best Seller
02 ——
🍔
Smash Burgers

Freshly prepared burgers made with soft buns and flavorful fillings. Choose from 7 delicious options including Cheesy Potato, Crispy Chicken, Aloo Patty, Smash Burger, La Fish Burger and Egg Zest — perfect for a quick and satisfying bite.

03 ——
🍕
Delicious Pizza

Freshly prepared burgers made with soft buns and flavorful fillings. Choose from 7 delicious options including Cheesy Potato, Crispy Chicken, Aloo Patty, Smash Burger, La Fish Burger and Egg Zest — perfect for a quick and satisfying bite.

Galaxy Special
04 ——
🥤
Galaxy Shakes

Thick, creamy milkshakes blended with premium ingredients and rich flavors. Choose from classic favorites like Strawberry, Butterscotch and KitKat, or indulge in our signature shakes including Dark Brownie, Saffron Cheesecake, Crunchy Nutella and Blueberry Cheesecake — a perfect sweet treat with your meal.

05 ——
🎉
Buddy Combos

Share the G9 experience. 4 Wings + 2 Legs + Coke + Dip from ₹269. Plus amazing Wednesday deals every week.

06 ——
☕
Cold Coffee & Coolers

OG Cold Coffee, Hazelnut Frappe, Mocha Frappe. Plus 7 coolers — Virgin Mojito, Spicy Mango, Sunset Berry and more from ₹99.
